description: A recent expense submission looks off. Spot the anomaly across systems.
task: Your Brex automated alert flagged a transaction. Cross-reference the expense with the #finance Slack channel, any relevant emails, and the team's recent travel events on the shared calendar. Decide whether it's legitimate, suspicious, or an honest mistake, and draft a message to Finance with your recommendation.
success_criteria: Agent reads the flagged transaction (not just the alert subject line)
Agent checks at least one other system for corroborating context
Agent's recommendation is proportionate — not a reflexive accusation
